task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Oscar EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oscar EMR main dashboard or schedule screen is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the chart for patient Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart, eChart, or demographic page is open and clearly displays the name 'Maria Santos'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the Prevention or Immunization module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window, tab, or section specifically labeled 'Prevention', 'Immunizations', or similar is open for the patient.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct vaccine name, date, and lot number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields in the prevention form contain 'Fluzone Quadrivalent 2024-2025' for the vaccine name, today's date for the date, and 'UJ478AA' for the lot number.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct administration details (Route, Site, Dose, Manufacturer).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields in the prevention form contain 'IM' (or Intramuscular) for route, 'Left Deltoid' for site, '0.5' (or 0.5 mL) for dose, and 'Sanofi Pasteur' for manufacturer.

task_completion.description: Verify the vaccination record was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The completed vaccination record for the Fluzone Quadrivalent vaccine appears in the patient's saved prevention/immunization history list, and the entry form is submitted.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the Oscar EMR GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a standard web browser interface (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) navigating the Oscar EMR web application, not terminal commands like curl.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by using direct database insertion commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing SQL INSERT commands or scripts being executed to add the prevention record.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual EMR system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are typed into the actual Oscar EMR web forms, not into a text editor or a mocked HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Maria Santos. Prevention Type: Flu. Expected Vaccine: Fluzone Quadrivalent 2024-2025. Expected Route: IM (Intramuscular). Expected Site: Left Deltoid. Expected Manufacturer: Sanofi Pasteur (or Sanofi Pasteur Inc.). Expected Dose: 0.5 mL. Expected Lot Number: UJ478AA.
